topics.title: Real Estate and Landlordship Debates
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of property ownership, the responsibilities of being a landlord, and the logistical challenges of managing multiple properties while maintaining a professional career.

topics.title: Radio Show Commentary and Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding internal staff dynamics, a guest's upcoming music special, and a series of prank phone calls involving inappropriate content.

topics.title: Real Estate and Lifestyle Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from television production history and celebrity interviews to personal real estate, luxury items like limousines, and the impact of local developments on property value.

topics.title: Real Estate Challenges and Discrimination
topics.summary: The studio explores the difficulties of navigating New York City real estate, including personal experiences with discrimination in apartment hunting and the complexities of co-op ownership.

topics.title: Arty's Beach Outfits and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Arty's choice of swimwear, rumors surrounding the band Led Zeppelin, and various celebrity news involving Dancing with the Stars.

topics.summary: The studio hosts a call with a couple who demonstrate a game involving blowing air into different parts of the body to determine the source of the resulting sound.

topics.title: Straw Stunt and Asshole Game
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where a guest performs a stunt involving blowing air through a straw into another person's rectum, followed by a discussion on the physical sensations of various sexual acts.

topics.title: Beetlejuice Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a guest named Beetlejuice who appears in an uncooperative and distressed mood while promoting his new DVD.

topics.title: Beadle Dumaresq Interview and Joe Pesci Segment
topics.summary: The studio features an emotional interaction with Beadle Dumaresq followed by a review of the top five songs and a pre-recorded interview with actor Joe Pesci.

topics.title: Celebrity Encounters and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity interactions involving Michael Bolton and Sharon Stone, the launch of Jamie Foxx's Foxhole channel, and an exposé on psychic Sylvia Brown.

topics.title: Missing Persons Case and Guest Interview
topics.summary: The show discusses the inaccuracies in a missing persons investigation involving Sylvia Brown, followed by an interview with a caller named Tiny who describes his life as a 600-pound man.

topics.title: Howard 100 News Updates and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features segments on local news updates, including a casting call for lookalikes and a New York Times crossword appearance, followed by discussions regarding personal hygiene, weight, and past anecdotes involving various personalities.

topics.title: News Segment Highlights
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of news stories including a rescued duck, an unusual tattoo incident, the rise in tortilla prices due to corn costs, and concerns over Chinese satellite interference.

topics.title: Space Exploration and Political News
topics.summary: The show covers the risks of Chinese satellite activity, Hillary Clinton's presidential bid, President Bush's address on the Iraq War, Academy Award nominations, and a legal case involving a Canadian serial killer.
